commentaries.author: Clement Of Rome
commentaries.content: For it was spiritual, as was also our Jesus, and was made manifest at the end of the days in order to save us.

commentaries.author: Shepherd of Hermas
commentaries.content: For this reason is He old. "And why is the gate new, sir? "I said. "Because "he answered, "He became manifest

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Was, (to arise) in the extreme end of the times.
